Dashboard.title: Autumn Runes Dashboard
Dashboard.description: Manage your Bitcoin Runes assets with real-time tracking.

About.title: What are Runes?
About.subtitle: The most efficient way to issue tokens on the ultimate blockchain.
About.section_1_desc: Unlike Ethereum's ERC-20, Runes live directly in your Bitcoin UTXOs (Unspent Transaction Outputs). Think of UTXOs like digital coins in your wallet. Runes piggyback on these coins.
About.section_2_desc: Information about your tokens is etched into a special field of a Bitcoin transaction called OP_RETURN. This avoids bloating the network, making Runes elegant and lightweight.
About.vs_brc20_desc: BRC-20 records heavy JSON files into the blockchain (Ordinals protocol), creating 'junk' data. Runes are native, leave a smaller footprint, and are cheaper to transact.
About.wallet_role_desc: Because the Bitcoin network only sees 'BTC', it doesn't natively know what a Rune is. Our wallet acts as an indexer. We read the OP_RETURN messages, calculate your balances, and protect your Rune-carrying UTXOs from being accidentally spent as regular network fees.

Wallet.title: My Wallet
Wallet.wallet_input_description: Enter any Bitcoin address to view its Runes balances, or connect a compatible wallet extension.

Market.title: Market Overview
Market.subtitle: Discover and track the top Runes tokens.
Market.highlight_desc: DOG•GO•TO•THE•MOON is leading the Runes ecosystem.

Marketplace.subtitle: Discover, buy, and sell Runes safely on L1.
Marketplace.beta_desc: The decentralized marketplace is currently undergoing security audits. Trading will be enabled soon.
Marketplace.connect_prompt: Connect your wallet to get early access when trading goes live.

History.title: Transaction History
History.subtitle: Review all past activities, mints, and transfers associated with your connected address.
History.no_history: No transactions found for this address.
